subcodes.first_line: O Beauty! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Self-Sufficing, the Most Exalted! The Greater Branch hath presented himself and hath laid before Us that which was sent unto him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جمال علیک بهاء الله الغنی المتعال غصن اکبر حاضر و عرض نمود آنچه را باو ارسال
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
